case_title: RODNEY E WILLIAMS VS. UNITED INTERNATIONAL INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES, A

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, RODNEY E AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED INTERNATIONAL INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, RODNEY E RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNITED INTERNATIONAL INVESTIGATIVE SERVICES, A CALIFORNIA CORP. $5,328.00 PRINCIPAL, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,432.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
